memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Mary de Monthermer (1297-1371)
memoryArtifacts.description: Mary MacDuff, Countess of Fife (née de Monthermer; October 1297 – circa 1371) was an English noblewoman. She was a daughter of Ralph de Monthermer, 1st Baron Monthermer and his wife Joan of Acre. Othe …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary de Monthermer於1297年10月出生在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特時，她的父親Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford27歲，母親Countess Joan of Acre25歲。她於1307年與Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1371年3月30日在蘇格蘭費伏享年73歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary de Monthermer于1297年10月出生在法国藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特时，她的父亲Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford27岁，母亲Countess Joan of Acre25岁。她于1307年与Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1371年3月30日在苏格兰費伏享年73岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary de Monthermer was born in October 1297, in Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, her father, Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford, was 27 and her mother, Countess Joan of Acre, was 25. She married Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife in 1307. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 30 March 1371, in Fife, Scotland, at the age of 73, and was buried in Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary de Monthermer est née en octobre 1297, à Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Countess Joan of Acre, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife en 1307. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 mars 1371, à Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary de Monthermer im Oktober 1297 in Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford 27 und ihre Mutter Countess Joan of Acre 25. Sie hat 1307 Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. März 1371 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Fife, Scotland und wurde in Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Monthermer è nata il nel ottobre 1297 nel Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, sua padre, Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Countess Joan of Acre, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife nel 1307. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 marzo 1371, nel Fife, Scotland, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary de Monthermerが1297年10月にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンheラウルトで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertfordは27歳，母Countess Joan of Acreは25歳であった。1307年にSir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fifeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1371年3月30日にスコットランドフィフで73歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary de Monthermer(이)가 1297년 10월 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Joan of Acre(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1307년 Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1371년 3월 30일 스컷랜드 피프에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Monthermer nasceu em outubro de 1297, em Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Countess Joan of Acre, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife em 1307. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de março de 1371, em Fife, Scotland, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary de Monthermer родилась октябрь 1297 г. в местности хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Joan of Acre, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife в 1307 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 30 марта 1371 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности фиф, Шотландия.

Se casó con Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife en 1307. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de marzo de 1371, en Fife, Scotland, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Fife, Scotland.
